candidates.text: FINAL UPDATE: There is NO crossplay between PS4 and PS5 VERSIONS of Black Ops 1 or Black Ops 2, BUT PS5 and PS4 players can play together if they both own the PS4 version of either game. This is the only way to get crossplay / cross platform, PS4 players can NOT play PS5 version.
